scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev -w @senko/api" "npm run dev -w @senko/web"
scripts.dev:fresh: concurrently -n api,web "npm run dev -w @senko/api" "npm run dev:fresh -w @senko/web"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate -w @senko/db && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run db:generate -w @senko/db && npm run build --workspaces --if-present && npm run lint -w @senko/web
scripts.crawl: npm run build -w @senko/crawler && npm run crawl -w @senko/crawler
